return(function(o,b,t,n,F,K,d,L,C,e,N,G,w,Q,A,s,J,M,I,V,z,Z,U,X)A,Q,N,X,w,z,U,e,J,I,M,V,s,Z,G,L,C={},function(o,j)local b=G(j)local t=function(t,n,F,K)return U(o,{t;n,F,K},j,b)end return t
